docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-03-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO DEC-05-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
FILED RESPONSE TO DEFENDANT'S CORRESPONDENCE TO THE COURT TO CONSOLIDATE CASES CSM-18-858764 AND CSM-19-859043. FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRATHER, MYESHA AS TO DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

RECEIVED SC-150 REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIA AFTER ENTRY OF DISMISSAL ON 12//05/18. PER PRIORITY MAIL ENVELOPE, REQUEST WAS MAILED ON 12/04/18 AT 5:04 P.M. - PER THE COURT'S DELIVERY LOG, ENVELOPE DELIVERED TO THE COURT ON 12/06/18. FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRATHER, MYESHA AS TO DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF MYESHA PRATHER. DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY GABRIELLE CIOFFI, RN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRATHER, MYESHA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 SERVED AUG-27-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH
(SC-152) ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED FILED BY DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH
RECEIVED COPY OF LETTER FROM DIGNITY HEALTH TO PLAINTIFF - LODGED IN COURT'S FILE.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY PRATHER, MYESHA AS TO DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
